purpose: Representative changed-path cases for selecting verification hints from repo signals.

cases.name: root cast command
cases.reason: Root command changes require sync and command-surface checks.

cases.name: installable cast command
cases.reason: Installable command changes require sync and command-surface checks.

cases.name: repo-local cast command
cases.reason: Repo-local Claude command changes require the same sync and command-surface checks.

cases.name: claude skill pair
cases.reason: Root and installable Claude skill changes require byte-identical sync.

cases.name: context map schema
cases.reason: Schema changes require schema shape checks.

cases.name: verification evidence schema
cases.reason: Verification evidence schema changes require schema shape checks.

cases.name: codex alias skill
cases.reason: Codex alias skill changes can affect the public command surface.

cases.name: memory docs note
cases.reason: Memory documentation does not match any current verification hint, so Tink should record that instead of inventing a check.
